trigger: Designing Triage's behavior around TODO status flips and dispatch
rule: Status flips (done / deferred / in-progress / blocked) auto-fire at confidence ≥ 0.85. NEVER surface them as awaiting cards. Status is a reflection of observable agent state, not a destructive action — TODO has unlimited undo. Dispatching an autoDispatch=true TODO also auto-fires. The ONLY TODO case that surfaces an awaiting card is  (Bucket C — Mukul hasn't decided whether to auto-dispatch this TODO ever). Mukul's exact words: 'I truly do not want to babysit and approve. If the work is done, TODO is done.'
why: On 2026-05-22 Mukul saw 12 dispatch-card-bait proposals on the dashboard and called it out. The original prompt had a 0.85-0.90 'surface as card' band that turned every confident triage decision into a babysit query. The fix removes the band — confidence ≥ 0.85 acts immediately, below 0.85 stays silent until the next pulse has better evidence.
